headline: Indian Pollution Probe Tests Apple Supply Chain And Valuation Gap
summary: Indian pollution regulators have accused Tata Electronics, a key Apple supplier, of contaminating local groundwater with wastewater. The probe focuses on a facility that plays an important role in producing iPhone components for Apple, listed as NasdaqGS:AAPL. Any regulatory action could affect operations at the plant and create complications for Apple's supply chain in India. For Apple, India has been a focus area for building out iPhone manufacturing capacity outside China, with local...

headline: Elon Musk drifted from Larry Page over a decade ago, but their companies are closer than ever
summary: SpaceX and Google have a long and complicated relationship, but they were both celebrating this week after Elon Musk's company held its blockbuster IPO.
